headline: Norfolk Southern Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) executives said the railroad exited the first quarter of 2026 with “solid momentum” after widespread winter storms disrupted operations and customer loadings in February, while higher fuel prices and merger-related expenses weighed on results. headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Norfolk Southern, Raises Price Target to $360
summary: Barclays  analyst Brandon Oglenski   maintains Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $320 to $360.

headline: Norfolk Southern Analysts Boost Their Forecasts Following Upbeat Q1 Earnings
summary: Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) reported better-than-expected earnings for Q1 despite challenges. Analysts maintain price targets for the stock.

headline: How The Union Pacific (UNP) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Merger Expectations
summary: Union Pacific’s updated fair value estimate sits at US$287.74, up from US$272.33, putting a higher modeled price level in focus for anyone tracking the stock. That move lines up with a recent tilt toward higher price targets from bullish research, even as a few trims and more neutral stances signal that not every concern around valuation and the Norfolk Southern transaction is cleared. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with the evolving analyst...
